channel.title: swiftlang/swift CHANGELOG.md
channel.description: The commit history of the CHANGELOG.md in the swiftlang/swift repository.

item.title: Merge pull request #85770 from ZevEisenberg/main Add SE-0489 (Codable erro...
item.description:
Merge pull request #85770 from ZevEisenberg/main
Add SE-0489 (Codable error debug descriptions) to changelog

item.title: Add SE-0489 (Codable error debug descriptions) to changelog.
item.description: Add SE-0489 (Codable error debug descriptions) to changelog.

item.title: [Concurrency] Warn about un-used throwing unstructured tasks Pending swift...
item.description:
[Concurrency] Warn about un-used throwing unstructured tasks
Pending swift evolution discussion: https://github.com/swiftlang/swift-evolution/pull/3133
replaces #87171
update new error message according to proposal
also handle untyped throws in _nonDiscardableWhenThrowing attr
Rename the internal attr _nonDiscardableWhenThrowingOperation

item.title: Update CHANGELOG for module selector enablement
item.description: Update CHANGELOG for module selector enablement
